description.en: Build a company OpenClaw onboarding agent with persistent memory, Telegram and email, code-gated pairing approval, and daily HR summaries.
description.es: Construye un agente OpenClaw de onboarding empresarial con memoria persistente, Telegram y correo, aprobación de pairing por código y resúmenes diarios para RRHH.
